name: Spinach Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 9 x 13 inch oven-safe pan at 350 degrees F (175 C) in the preheated oven.
2. In a large bowl, beat eggs and add flour, milk, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add grated cheese and thawed spinach to the mixture.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 35 minutes at 350 degrees F (175 C).
6. Allow the dish to cool slightly.
7. Slice into squares of desired size.
Note: Per Serving: 574.3 Calories; 27.5g Protein; 23.4g Carbohydrate; 1103.0mg Sodium; 2.9g Fiber; 40.3g Fat; 10.9g Saturated Fat; 217.5mg Cholesterol; 370.8 Calories from Fat (64.6%).
